syntheticDeclaration.purpose: SYNTHETIC TEST FIXTURE. Exercises anemia + microcytic morphology + elevated CRP with iron studies (ferritin/TSAT/TIBC) recorded only as 'unknown', proving the engine abstains rather than guessing iron-deficiency-anemia from morphology and inflammation status alone. All values are invented for schema and safety-test purposes only.

executionBinding.engineRationale: Incomplete-iron-studies-with-inflammation is expressible as a patient-input.schema.json labs input and evaluated by assessPediatricAnemia.

expectedBehavior.requiredSignal: Inflammation or incomplete study context makes a simple iron interpretation unsafe. Conflict/missingness exposed and pathway abstains where material.
forbiddenSignals: a ranked iron-deficiency-anemia or anemia-of-inflammation candidate produced from microcytic morphology and elevated CRP alone, without ferritin/TSAT/TIBC values
silent selection of one diagnosis when the inflammatory iron-restriction pattern cannot be computed from status-only labs

expectedTrace.note: Verified by direct execution on 2026-07-19. Despite anemia present + microcytic morphology + CRP elevated, rankedDifferential is empty because ferritin/TSAT/TIBC are supplied only as status='unknown' (ID-001 needs a numeric ferritin value; AINF-001 needs tsatLow/tibcLowOrNormal, both false when unknown). The engine asks Q-MICRO-001/Q-MICRO-005 rather than guessing.

rollbackSignal: Re-verify by execution if modules/anemia/rules.json, candidates.json, or module.json digests change, or if ID-001/AINF-001/AINF-002/AINF-003 conditions are edited.
